frontend.data: SWR for client state, server components for static
frontend.deploy: Vercel (preview) / standalone Node on VDS (prod via systemd)

backend.runtime: Python 3.12+, FastAPI (>=0.115), Uvicorn (>=0.32), Pydantic v2 (>=2.9), pydantic-settings (>=2.6)
backend.orm: SQLAlchemy 2.x async (>=2.0) with asyncpg/psycopg drivers; aiosqlite for tests. No ORM auto-REST.
backend.http-client: httpx (>=0.28) — sole client for SolarSage and outbound calls

local-adaptation.note: LA-PYDANTIC-SOT: Pydantic models in apps/api/app/schemas/* are the single source of truth for API payload shapes; TS types in packages/contracts are autogenerated from OpenAPI. See W-1.1B Option B.

llm.fallback: Direct provider via env when AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY unset

infra.orchestration: docker-compose for dev, systemd units for VDS
infra.agent-orchestration: Prefect runtime + project-local GRACE adapter under grace/orchestrator/*
infra.reverse-proxy: None at MVP (frontend serves itself, API on its own port)

boundary.contract: C-TODAY-PAYLOAD, C-CALENDAR-PAYLOAD, C-PROFILE-PAYLOAD, C-NATAL-PAYLOAD, C-AUTH, C-CHECKIN, C-API-ERROR
boundary.rule: Frontend renders payloads. It does not interpret astrology, does not select flags, does not compute statuses.
LLM receives only curated SemanticLayer. No raw SolarSage, no internal scoring fields. LLM returns C-LLM-RESPONSE strict JSON.
Backend is the only client of the sidecar. Sidecar never speaks to frontend or LLM.
No ORM with auto-generated REST. SQLAlchemy 2.x async (typed Mapped/mapped_column style) for queries; hand-written SQL for hot paths. All cache rows carry input_hash + version columns.

versions.version: Bumped only when TodayPayload / CalendarPayload / ProfilePayload shape changes in a way the current frontend cannot render. Local strict adaptation: frontend treats unknown block.type as graceful skip (docs/06 §1) which lets us extend without bumping contract_version for additive changes.
Bumped on any change to natal/period/daily computation. Forces reinvalidation of natal_snapshots, period_snapshots, daily_snapshots.
Bumped on AstroSignal field/semantics changes. Invalidates semantic_layers downstream.
Bumped on scoring formula change (salience weights, tension/support, status mapping). Invalidates semantic_layers and today_payloads.

Bumped on changes to grace/canon/spheres.v1.yml, dignities.v1.yml, aspect_rules.v1.yml, or activation_rules.v1.yml. Invalidates derived scores, semantic_layers, and today_payloads without changing frontend contracts.
Bumped on LLM prompt or model change. Invalidates today_payloads.
Bumped on microcopy.vN.json mutation (docs/12 §6). Invalidates today_payloads.
Per-payload (e.g. natal/v1). Block type registry is additive; unknown blocks skipped on frontend.

invalidation-rules.rule: natal change → user's natal_snapshots → period_snapshots → daily_snapshots → semantic_layers → today_payloads
current_location change → period_snapshots → daily_snapshots → semantic_layers → today_payloads
prompt_version or content_version bump → today_payloads only

local-adaptations.adaptation: Canon requires versioned artifacts; we extend to 6 layered versions (contract/calculation/normalization/scoring/prompt/content) each with its own invalidation scope. Justification: enables changing internals without breaking the frontend.

Canon requires a business verification layer between data and presentation; we materialize it as a persistent SemanticLayer cache row, not a transient transform. Justification: reproducibility, debug endpoint can replay.
Hard limits accepted locally: function ≤ 80 lines, file ≤ 400 lines, route handler ≤ 120 lines. Exceptions require comment with justification.
Frontend treats unknown block.type and unknown TopFlag.type as graceful skip with dev-mode log, never crash. Justification: reduces churn on contract_version bumps.
Pilot slice (PHASE-1) returns fixture-backed payloads from real backend. Justification: validates auth/access/contract path independently of the heavy astro+LLM pipeline.

apps/solarsage/collect_solarsage_western_deep.py is accepted as a temporary reference collector, not the final product service. It may remain a large single-shot CLI until W-SOLARSAGE-SVC splits it, but all future code must preserve parity against its approved golden outputs before replacing it.

Astrological scoring knowledge lives in versioned canon YAML, not in Python magic constants. This local adaptation exists because scoring quality must be reviewable by agents and humans without reading implementation code.

data-stores.store: Birth + locations + house_system. Mutation triggers cascading invalidation.
Append-only events with consumed_days counter. Source of truth for access state.
Bonus and paid credits with expiry.
user_id × date × normalization_version × scoring_version × scoring_canon_version → payload_json.
user_id × date × contract_version × interpretation_version × prompt_version × content_version → payload_json.
date × event_key × count. For dictionary growth.

env.name: dev-local
env.flag: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_FIXTURES=true bypasses backend; frontend reads lib/mocks.

env.name: vds-prod
env.flag: systemd: astro-web, astro-api, astro-worker, astro-backup, solarsage

env.name: vercel-preview
env.flag: Frontend only; API may point to staging VDS.

decision.rationale: Industry standard for Python testing, excellent async support, rich fixture ecosystem
Fast, Vite-native, Jest-compatible API, ESM support
Headless browser automation, built-in screenshots, cross-browser support, fast execution
Async-native, ASGI transport for FastAPI testing, requests-compatible API

banned.ban: Sending raw SolarSage or internal scoring fields to LLM.
Mixing raw and curated data in the same cache row.
Adding astrology interpretation in frontend code.
Letting the LLM calculate chart factors, aspects, dignity, lots, activations, or scores.
Adding new scoring sphere tables, dignity modifiers, aspect thresholds, convergence weights, or top-N cutoffs directly in Python/TypeScript instead of versioned grace/canon/*.yml.
Encoding GRACE packet semantics only inside Prefect flow code. Prefect may execute, but the packet/schema/role/verification truth must remain in grace/orchestrator/*.
Starting coder agents on packets that fail the orchestrator contract gate.
Editing packages/contracts/_generated.ts by hand (regenerate from Pydantic via pnpm contracts:generate).
Adding new payload shapes in TS first; shapes originate in apps/api/app/schemas/* (Pydantic SoT, W-1.1B Option B).
Importing payload types from packages/contracts/{today,calendar,natal,access}.ts directly — these are deprecated thin re-exports; new code MUST import from packages/contracts (barrel).
Using SQLModel for new models (legacy reference in early drafts; SQLAlchemy 2.x async is the canon).
